mapper.select: SELECT c.id, u.id AS writerId, u.name AS writerName, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM community_comment c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_comment(user_id, board_id, content) VALUES (#{user.id}, #{community.id}, #{content})
